final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing museum exhibition infographic for a Chinese ethnic minority costume, styled as a National Museum collection catalog page.

Style/medium: museum-grade archival infographic, editorial illustration with photorealistic costume rendering, academic diagram style inspired by Palace Museum exhibition panels, matte paper texture, restrained and scholarly aesthetic
Composition: vertical layout with structured grid zones, central full-body figure wearing traditional costume as primary visual anchor, annotated with numbered callout lines, 4:3 aspect ratio for catalog presentation
Subject: full-body standing figure (adult female) wearing traditional Miao/Hmong silver-embroidered festival attire with elaborate silver headdress, layered indigo batik garments, silver jewelry collar, embroidered apron, and pleated skirt
Scene/backdrop: neutral warm paper background in off-white/rice paper tone with subtle grain texture, no environmental distractions, museum display context implied through clean framing
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting from upper left, gentle shadows to reveal textile texture and silver ornament relief, dignified and reverent atmosphere
Color palette: deep indigo blue as dominant, warm silver/metallic gray as secondary accent, natural hemp/cotton beige as neutral, minimal red embroidery highlights, overall muted and archival
Materials/textures: hand-woven hemp cloth with visible weave, indigo batik wax-resist patterns, hammered silver ornaments with patina, silk embroidery threads, pleated cotton skirt texture
Text (verbatim): "中国少数民族服饰图鉴" "苗族银饰盛装" "结构拆解" "材质工艺" "纹样寓意" "穿着顺序"
Constraints: all text must be clear simplified Chinese characters, no garbled text or pinyin, labels must correspond to actual costume components, layout must follow specified 5-zone structure (header, left structural breakdown, upper-right material zone, middle-right pattern zone, bottom flowchart)
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio portrait lighting, e-commerce styling, anime illustration, cosplay feel, cluttered decorations, incorrect structural labels, blurry text, fake materials, gradient backgrounds, stock photo look
